tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_chat_broadcast_between_two_contexts
tests.trace:
start_app = None
browser = <Browser type=<BrowserType name=chromium executable_path=/root/.cache/ms-playwright/chromium-1223/chrome-linux64/chrome> version=148.0.7778.96>

    def test_chat_broadcast_between_two_contexts(start_app, browser):
        """Open two browser contexts; send messages from A; verify B receives them; then reply from B and verify A."""
        context_a = browser.new_context()
        context_b = browser.new_context()
        try:
            page_a = context_a.new_page()
            page_b = context_b.new_page()
